description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle featuring a wooden stock with a smooth, polished finish and a dark, blued steel barrel. The stock extends from the butt to the fore-end, providing a solid grip and traditional appearance. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a rear notch and a front post, both mounted on the barrel. The trigger guard and bolt handle are visible, indicating manual cycling of the action. The magazine is internal, with no detachable box or external magazine visible. The muzzle is plain, with no additional device such as a flash hider or suppressor attached.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, blued steel barrel, and iron sights. It features an internal magazine and a plain muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, blued barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the rounded butt of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, barrel, and sight alignment, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
